revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text: {{Redirect|Template:List|bulleted and unbulleted lists|Template:HTML lists|lists of links to directories|Template:Lists}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Twinkle standard installation}} == Description == This template will add tagged articles to a cleanup category according to the month and year given. == Usage == :{{Prose|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} → [[:Category:Articles needing cleanup from {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}]] and [[:Category:Articles with sections that need to be turned into prose from {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}]]. If no date is given, articles will be added to the more general [[:Category:Wikipedia cleanup]] and [[:Category:Articles with sections that need to be turned into prose]]. Parameter 1 may be included to replace "article" with a specific term, such as "section" or "table". For example: :{{Prose|section|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} ...would display as: {{Prose|section|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|demospace=main|nocat=true}} == Closely related templates == Please keep this template's messaging consistent with the related templates: * {{tlx|Create list}} – the opposite of this template * {{tlx|Trivia}} – suggests relocation rather than reformatting of the details in a trivia section * {{tlx|Expand list}} – for use where a list is too short/incomplete * {{tlx|List to table}} – for use where a table would be better than a list * {{tlx|Table to prose}} – for use where prose is preferable to a table * {{tlx|Example farm}} – for articles or sections with too many examples == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Writing better articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Trivia sections]] * [[Wikipedia:Handling trivia]] – [[WP:Essays|essay]] on trivia in Wikipedia, what it is and how it should be handled * [[Wikipedia:"In popular culture" content]] – essay on "popular culture"–types articles and sections * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Trivia Cleanup]] – WikiProject designed to clean up long lists of trivia in articles * [[Wikipedia:Proseline]] – essay on avoiding writing prose paragraphs that end up looking like a list anyway * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup]] – index of cleanup templates ==TemplateData== {{TemplateDataHeader}} { "description": "Use this maintenance template to indicate that an article is in list format but may read better as prose.", "format": "inline", "params": { "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "The month and year that the template was placed (in full). \"May 2025\" inserts the current month and year automatically.", "type": "line", "autovalue": "May 2025", "example": "January 2013", "suggested": true }, "1": { "label": "Affected area", "description": "Text to replace the word \"article\", usually \"section\"", "type": "line", "autovalue": "section", "example": "section" } }, "paramOrder": [ "date", "1" ] } {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:List cleanup templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Coherency templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Redirect|Template:List|bulleted and unbulleted lists|Template:HTML lists|lists of links to directories|Template:Lists}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Twinkle standard installation}} == Description == This template will add tagged articles to a cleanup category according to the month and year given. == Usage == :{{Prose|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} → [[:Category:Articles needing cleanup from {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}]] and [[:Category:Articles with sections that need to be turned into prose from {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}]]. If no date is given, articles will be added to the more general [[:Category:Wikipedia cleanup]] and [[:Category:Articles with sections that need to be turned into prose]]. Parameter 1 may be included to replace "article" with a specific term, such as "section" or "table". For example: :{{Prose|section|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} ...would display as: {{Prose|section|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|demospace=main|nocat=true}} == Closely related templates == Please keep this template's messaging consistent with the related templates: * {{tlx|Create list}} – the opposite of this template * {{tlx|Trivia}} – suggests relocation rather than reformatting of the details in a trivia section * {{tlx|Expand list}} – for use where a list is too short/incomplete * {{tlx|List to table}} – for use where a table would be better than a list * {{tlx|Table to prose}} – for use where prose is preferable to a table * {{tlx|Example farm}} – for articles or sections with too many examples == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Writing better articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Trivia sections]] * [[Wikipedia:Handling trivia]] – [[WP:Essays|essay]] on trivia in Wikipedia, what it is and how it should be handled * [[Wikipedia:"In popular culture" content]] – essay on "popular culture"–types articles and sections * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Trivia Cleanup]] – WikiProject designed to clean up long lists of trivia in articles * [[Wikipedia:Proseline]] – essay on avoiding writing prose paragraphs that end up looking like a list anyway * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup]] – index of cleanup templates ==TemplateData== {{TemplateDataHeader}} { "description": "Use this maintenance template to indicate that an article is in list format but may read better as prose.", "format": "inline", "params": { "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "The month and year that the template was placed (in full). \"May 2025\" inserts the current month and year automatically.", "type": "line", "autovalue": "May 2025", "example": "January 2013", "suggested": true }, "1": { "label": "Affected area", "description": "Text to replace the word \"article\", usually \"section\"", "type": "line", "autovalue": "section", "example": "section" } }, "paramOrder": [ "date", "1" ] } {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:List cleanup templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Coherency templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Redirect|Template:List|bulleted and unbulleted lists|Template:HTML lists|lists of links to directories|Template:Lists}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Twinkle standard installation}} == Description == This template will add tagged articles to a cleanup category according to the month and year given. == Usage == :{{Prose|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} → [[:Category:Articles needing cleanup from {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}]] and [[:Category:Articles with sections that need to be turned into prose from {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}]]. If no date is given, articles will be added to the more general [[:Category:Wikipedia cleanup]] and [[:Category:Articles with sections that need to be turned into prose]]. Parameter 1 may be included to replace "article" with a specific term, such as "section" or "table". For example: :{{Prose|section|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} ...would display as: {{Prose|section|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|demospace=main|nocat=true}} == Closely related templates == Please keep this template's messaging consistent with the related templates: * {{tlx|Create list}} – the opposite of this template * {{tlx|Trivia}} – suggests relocation rather than reformatting of the details in a trivia section * {{tlx|Expand list}} – for use where a list is too short/incomplete * {{tlx|List to table}} – for use where a table would be better than a list * {{tlx|Table to prose}} – for use where prose is preferable to a table * {{tlx|Example farm}} – for articles or sections with too many examples == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Writing better articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Trivia sections]] * [[Wikipedia:Handling trivia]] – [[WP:Essays|essay]] on trivia in Wikipedia, what it is and how it should be handled * [[Wikipedia:"In popular culture" content]] – essay on "popular culture"–types articles and sections * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Trivia Cleanup]] – WikiProject designed to clean up long lists of trivia in articles * [[Wikipedia:Proseline]] – essay on avoiding writing prose paragraphs that end up looking like a list anyway * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup]] – index of cleanup templates ==TemplateData== revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Redirect|Template:List|bulleted and unbulleted lists|Template:HTML lists|lists of links to directories|Template:Lists}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Twinkle standard installation}} == Description == This template will add tagged articles to a cleanup category according to the month and year given. == Usage == :{{Prose|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} → [[:Category:Articles needing cleanup from {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}]] and [[:Category:Articles with sections that need to be turned into prose from {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}]]. If no date is given, articles will be added to the more general [[:Category:Wikipedia cleanup]] and [[:Category:Articles with sections that need to be turned into prose]]. Parameter 1 may be included to replace "article" with a specific term, such as "section" or "table". For example: :{{Prose|section|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} ...would display as: {{Prose|section|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|demospace=main|nocat=true}} == Closely related templates == Please keep this template's messaging consistent with the related templates: * {{tlx|Create list}} – the opposite of this template * {{tlx|Trivia}} – suggests relocation rather than reformatting of the details in a trivia section * {{tlx|Expand list}} – for use where a list is too short/incomplete * {{tlx|List to table}} – for use where a table would be better than a list * {{tlx|Table to prose}} – for use where prose is preferable to a table * {{tlx|Example farm}} – for articles or sections with too many examples == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Writing better articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Trivia sections]] * [[Wikipedia:Handling trivia]] – [[WP:Essays|essay]] on trivia in Wikipedia, what it is and how it should be handled * [[Wikipedia:"In popular culture" content]] – essay on "popular culture"–types articles and sections * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Trivia Cleanup]] – WikiProject designed to clean up long lists of trivia in articles * [[Wikipedia:Proseline]] – essay on avoiding writing prose paragraphs that end up looking like a list anyway * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup]] – index of cleanup templates ==TemplateData== "Month and year", "description": "The month and year that the template was placed (in full). \"May 2025\" inserts the current month and year automatically.", "type": "line", "autovalue": "May 2025", "example": "January 2013", "suggested": true }, "1": { "label": "Affected area", "description": "Text to replace the word \"article\", usually \"section\"", "type": "line", "autovalue": "section", revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Redirect|Template:List|bulleted and unbulleted lists|Template:HTML lists|lists of links to directories|Template:Lists}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Twinkle standard installation}} == Description == This template will add tagged articles to a cleanup category according to the month and year given. == Usage == :{{Prose|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} → [[:Category:Articles needing cleanup from {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}]] and [[:Category:Articles with sections that need to be turned into prose from {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}]]. If no date is given, articles will be added to the more general [[:Category:Wikipedia cleanup]] and [[:Category:Articles with sections that need to be turned into prose]]. Parameter 1 may be included to replace "article" with a specific term, such as "section" or "table". For example: :{{Prose|section|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} ...would display as: {{Prose|section|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|demospace=main|nocat=true}} == Closely related templates == Please keep this template's messaging consistent with the related templates: * {{tlx|Create list}} – the opposite of this template * {{tlx|Trivia}} – suggests relocation rather than reformatting of the details in a trivia section * {{tlx|Expand list}} – for use where a list is too short/incomplete * {{tlx|List to table}} – for use where a table would be better than a list * {{tlx|Table to prose}} – for use where prose is preferable to a table * {{tlx|Example farm}} – for articles or sections with too many examples == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Writing better articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Trivia sections]] * [[Wikipedia:Handling trivia]] – [[WP:Essays|essay]] on trivia in Wikipedia, what it is and how it should be handled * [[Wikipedia:"In popular culture" content]] – essay on "popular culture"–types articles and sections * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Trivia Cleanup]] – WikiProject designed to clean up long lists of trivia in articles * [[Wikipedia:Proseline]] – essay on avoiding writing prose paragraphs that end up looking like a list anyway * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup]] – index of cleanup templates ==TemplateData== "Month and year", "description": "The month and year that the template was placed (in full). \"May 2025\" inserts the current month and year automatically.", "type": "line", "autovalue": "May 2025", "example": "January 2013", "suggested": true }, "1": { "label": "Affected area", "description": "Text to replace the word \"article\", usually \"section\"", "type": "line", "autovalue": "section", "example": "section" } }, "paramOrder": [ "date", "1" ] } {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:List cleanup templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Coherency templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]

If no date is given, articles will be added to the more general [[:Category:Wikipedia cleanup]] and [[:Category:Articles with sections that need to be turned into prose]]. Parameter 1 may be included to replace "article" with a specific term, such as "section" or "table". For example: :{{Prose|section|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} ...would display as: {{Prose|section|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|demospace=main|nocat=true}} == Closely related reformatting of the details in a trivia section * {{tlx|Expand list}} – for use where a list is too short/incomplete * {{tlx|List to table}} – for use where a table would be better than a list * [[Wikipedia:Proseline]] – essay on avoiding writing prose paragraphs that end up looking like a list anyway * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup]] – index of cleanup templates ==TemplateData==
